ses.contactlist.CfnAbout: A list that contains contacts that have subscribed to a particular topic or topics.

ses.contactlist.ContactListName.Description: The name of the contact list.

ses.contactlist.Description.Description: A description of what the contact list is about.

ses.contactlist.Tags.Description: The tags associated with a contact list.

ses.contactlist.Topics.Description: An interest group, theme, or label within a list. A contact list can have multiple topics.
